metadata.description: Lean, optional overlay to tailor CV extraction and phrasing for Software Engineers without bloating core frameworks.

senior_indicators: Designed/owned service architecture with clear SLAs/SLOs
Led critical migrations or refactors with measurable outcomes
Improved performance/reliability at scale (p95/p99, error budgets)
Drove roadmap trade-offs and delivery predictability
impact_metrics: Code quality (coverage, defect density, review turnaround)
achievement_templates: Designed and delivered [service/system] handling [QPS/users]; improved p95 latency from [X]ms to [Y]ms (↑[K]%) using [approach]
Led migration from [legacy] to [new stack]; reduced infra cost by [K]% and improved availability from [X]% to [Y]% (SLO) over [N] months
Implemented CI/CD pipeline (blue/green/canary); cut lead time from [X]d to [Y]h; increased deployment frequency from [A]/mo to [B]/wk
Added observability (metrics/traces/logs); reduced MTTR from [X]h to [Y]m; improved change failure rate to [Z]%
Refactored [module]; reduced defect density by [K]% and improved test coverage from [X]% to [Y]%
missing_info_prompts: What scale (QPS/users/regions) did your service handle?
What reliability targets (SLA/SLO) and outcomes were achieved?
What performance changes (before → after) and cost impact?
Which specific design decisions/trade-offs did you lead?
Any DORA metrics improvements (lead time, MTTR, deployment frequency)?

scoring_overrides.notes: Bias content weight toward architectural impact and reliability/performance outcomes.

brevity.rule: Lead with scale/metric; 1 outcome per bullet; consolidate low-impact details.
